in Jaipur

The Pink City — where blue pottery and block printing meet India's largest craft tourism economy

State
ODOP Product

Blue Pottery

Jaipur's Persian-influenced blue pottery tradition dates back to the Mughal era. The city's artisan clusters in Sanganer and Bagru have kept the craft alive across centuries.

Product
Blue Pottery
Category
Handicrafts & Pottery
GI Tag
No
Market Size
₹300 Cr annual market
Export Potential
High
Export Markets
USA, UK, Europe, Japan
Raw Materials
Quartz stone powder + multani mitti + glass + kuleeru gum + water
Business Opportunity
Setup Cost Range
₹20000 – ₹200000
D2C Gross Margin
65-80%
Wholesale Margin
35-45%
Breakeven Timeline
6-10 months
Ideal For

Home décor entrepreneurs and craft enthusiasts

Not ideal for: Those without patience for fragile handmade processes

Revenue Streams

How you'll make money

Primary buyer: Design-conscious consumers 28-45, urban India and international

1D2C home décor brand
2Export to design stores
3Tourism retail in Jaipur
4Wholesale to urban lifestyle stores
5Corporate gifting
Step-by-Step Guide

How to start

From zero to first sale — concrete steps specific to Jaipur and Blue Pottery.

1
Learn / Research
Visit Sanganer pottery cluster — take a 2-week hands-on workshop
2
Source Raw Materials
Source raw materials from local Jaipur suppliers (very accessible)
3
Produce / Partner
Work with a master potter for first 50 pieces — observe and assist
4
Brand & Register
Create Instagram page with aesthetic lifestyle photography
5
First Sale
Sell at Dilli Haat Delhi and Jaipur markets — test pricing
6
Scale
Apply for Rajasthan ODOP scheme and list on Amazon Karigar
Events & Expos

Where to show up

Upcoming trade shows and craft expos relevant to Blue Pottery.

Vendors & Suppliers

Where to source

Raw material suppliers and manufacturers for Blue Pottery in and around Jaipur.

Premium
Sanganer Pottery Supplies
Raw Material Supplier · Jaipur
Quartz powder, multani mitti and raw materials for blue pottery. Only supplier in Jaipur.
WhatsApp
Jaipur Glaze Works
Glazing & Colour Supplier · Jaipur
Cobalt and oxide colours for blue pottery glazing. Professional grade.
WhatsApp
Brand Name Ideas

Name your brand

Blue Jaipur
Rang Mahal Crafts
Jaipuri Atelier
The Pottery Co.
Azure India
Marketing Ideas

How to get customers

  • Aesthetic flat-lay photography of pottery pieces — very Pinterest/Instagram shareable
  • Export to Etsy — highest margin channel for blue pottery globally
  • Collaborate with interior designers for B2B orders
Government Schemes & Funding

Free money you didn't know about

🏛️
PMEGP
grant for handicraft manufacturing
🏢
Rajasthan ODOP support scheme for blue pottery artisans
Registration required: Required — udyamregistration.gov.in
